revision.comment: start with this
let's see how this goes
adj

Protected "[[Module:Side box/styles.css]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]], match parent ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
pp
align-items: center
give these a top/bottom margin in all cases, adjust min-width margin statements accordingly
use display flow-root to force a new Block formatting context
flex min-width:0 hack to prevent content overflowing the container.
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Side_box/styles.css]]: importing template for usage on this wiki. It is used a lot
codex var
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Side_box/styles.css]]
codex var
1 revision imported: importing all the coordinates module stuff with the timestamps removed in order to force updates
codex var
8 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:Side_box/styles.css]]: importing because this actually has redlinks for a lot of the articles
codex var
codex var
codex var
codex var

Override font-size for embedded side boxes. Non-embedded [[Template:Side box]] gets `font-size: 88%;` from [[Module:Side box/styles.css#L-6]]; an embedded [[Template:Side box]] (usually through the module) gets the same 88% plus another 88% from [[Special:Permalink/1278705130#L-257--L-264|class .infobox at MediaWiki:Common.css]] (to be migrated to [[Module:Infobox/styles.css]]). 0.88*0.88=0.7744, which is less than 85% from the guideline [[MOS:FONTSIZE]]. See also [[Special:Diff/1290232777]]

Override font-size for embedded side boxes. Non-embedded [[Template:Side box]] gets `font-size: 88%;` from [[Module:Side box/styles.css#L-6]]; an embedded [[Template:Side box]] (usually through the module) gets the same 88% plus another 88% from [[Special:Permalink/1278705130#L-257--L-264|class .infobox at MediaWiki:Common.css]] (to be migrated to [[Module:Infobox/styles.css]]). 0.88*0.88=0.7744, which is less than 85% from the guideline [[MOS:FONTSIZE]]. See also [[Special:Diff/1290232777]]
fix text color in dark mode; this generally works but may cause problems, in which case revert or try specifying a different CSS value
